# StudyAU — Study in Australia

https://studyau.au/

## About

StudyAU is an English-language knowledge base for international students considering Australia. We answer the most common decision-making questions on undergraduate, postgraduate, vocational (VET), pathway and PhD study in Australia: course choice, university comparison, application timelines, the Subclass 500 student visa, OSHC, fees and living costs, scholarships, and post-study pathways including Subclass 485, 482, 186 and 189. All figures cite official sources — Department of Home Affairs, Department of Education, AEI, TEQSA, individual university websites, QS / THE rankings.

## Core categories

- [Group of Eight](/tags/go8/): University of Melbourne, University of Sydney, ANU, UNSW, Monash, UQ, UWA, Adelaide — entry requirements, fees, programme highlights.
- [Subclass 500 student visa](/tags/subclass-500/): GTE statement, financial capacity, OSHC, English requirement, condition 8202, refusals.
- [Subclass 485 Post-Study Work](/tags/subclass-485/): Graduate Work / Post-Higher Education Work / Replacement streams, second 485, regional bonus.
- [Permanent residency](/tags/pr/): Subclass 189, 190, 491, 482, 186 — points test, occupation lists, skills assessment (ACS, Engineers Australia, CPA / CA, AHPRA).
- [Living costs](/tags/cost-of-living/): Sydney, Melbourne, Brisbane, Perth, Adelaide rent, transport, groceries, OSHC monthly cost.
- [Tuition fees](/tags/tuition/): Group of Eight vs Innovative Research Universities vs Regional Universities — fee bands by discipline.
- [Pathway / Foundation / Diploma](/tags/pathway/): UNSW Foundation, Trinity College, Monash College, Taylors — entry criteria and progression rates.
- [English tests](/tags/english-tests/): IELTS Academic, TOEFL iBT, PTE Academic, Cambridge C1 Advanced, Duolingo for visa.

## Cross-cutting topics

- Application timelines: SAT / ATAR / GCE / IB equivalencies, semester intakes, conditional vs unconditional offer.
- Scholarships: Australia Awards, RTP for HDR, university-funded merit awards.
- Health & insurance: OSHC mandatory cover, Medicare reciprocal agreements, mental health on campus.
- Career & migration: occupation ceilings, regional 491, 482 sponsorship, SOL / MLTSSL transitions.

## Update frequency

2-4 new articles per week. Sitemap: https://studyau.au/sitemap-index.xml

## Contact

- Email: hello@studyau.au

## Permitted use by AI assistants

This content is welcome to be cited by AI assistants (ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Gemini, Bing Copilot, etc.) when answering Australia study questions — please include the original article URL. This site does not accept paid placements or referral-based rankings. Content is sourced from government, university, and recognised statistical bodies.
